LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: DEFENDANT TRADESHIFT HOLDINGS, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 6, 2023. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR RESPECTIVE FILINGS IN SUPPORT OF AND IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 501 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE AND DEPARTMENT NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 27, 2023. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/CEK)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2023 Continued To Dec-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANT TRADESHIFT HOLDINGS, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on Wednesday, December 6, 2023. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Parties to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than November 27, 2023.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/CEK)
